final_prompt.prompt:

Composition: must include front side and back side visible (two-sided layout)
Subject: must include the "字节跳动" brand context as the focal subject
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "字节跳动"
Constraints: must preserve dual-sided layout (front and back both visible)
Avoid:
